requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Compliance and Labeling Evidence for Regulated Refrigerator Models
requirement_topic.zh: 受监管冰箱型号的能效合规与标签
requirement_topic.zht: 受規範冰箱型號的能效合規與標籤

summary.en: For household refrigerators that are screened into UAE regulated-product channels, the evidence package normally includes energy-efficiency test methodology and declaration language aligned to UAE.S and/or GSO-referenced practice. MoIAT-facing files often reference IEC-family measurement methods and product class-level declarations rather than accepting China CEL tables as-is. Chinese annual kWh test values must be reviewed against the UAE route used for the model and the required declaration language.
summary.zh: 对进入阿联酋受监管渠道的家用冰箱，通常需要提供与UAE.S或GSO引用实践一致的能效测试方法和申明语言。MoIAT审查通常依赖IEC系列测量方法和型号级声明，而不是直接接受中国CEL表格。应按目标阿联酋路径复核中国能耗年度数据与声明语言的适用性。
summary.zht: 對進入阿聯酋受管道的家用冰箱，通常需要提供與UAE.S或GSO引用實務一致的能效測試方法和聲明語言。MoIAT審查通常依賴IEC系列測量方法和型號級聲明，而非直接接受中國CEL表格。應按目標阿聯酋路徑複核中國能耗年度數據與聲明語言的適用性。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S and GSO-referenced energy-efficiency rule sets for household appliances where applicable
IEC 62552 (household and similar refrigerating appliances — methods used by many UAE-referenced conformity documents)
MoIAT product status and conformity processes where efficiency declaration is part of the route

summary.en: China's baseline is mandatory GB 12021.2 and model-level energy claims under the China Energy Label system using GB/T 8059 testing. These are valid for China domestic compliance and often useful for technical reference, but they are not an automatic substitute for UAE/EU-style efficiency routing evidence requested by importers and MoIAT-facing files.
summary.zh: 中国基线主要为强制性GB 12021.2及以GB/T 8059检测为依据的中国能效标识系统。该体系对中国境内合规有效，且可作为技术参考，但在阿联酋或UAE.S/GSO路径的合规文件中通常不能直接替代。
summary.zht: 中國基線主要為強制性GB 12021.2及以GB/T 8059檢測為依據的中國能效標識系統。該體系對中國境內合規有效，且可作為技術參考，但在阿聯酋或UAE.S/GSO路徑的合規文件中通常不能直接替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators
GB/T 8059 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods
China Energy Label Programme — domestic mandatory/regulated deployment basis

gap.en: The gap is usually declaration semantics and route confirmation. Chinese energy figures are useful, but EUA.S/GSO filing packets in UAE pathways often require route-specific wording, model categorisation, and local market-facing label format. Treat imported refrigerators as a new market entry file unless MoIAT/EQM route confirmation states otherwise.
gap.zh: 差距通常在于声明语义和路径确认。中国能耗数据可用于参考，但在阿联酋路径中的UAE.S/GSO文件常要求特定路径表述、型号分类和本地市场标签格式。除非MoIAT/EQM确认可直接复用，否则应按新市场准入文件处理。
gap.zht: 差距通常在於聲明語義和路徑確認。中國能耗數據可用於參考，但在阿聯酋路徑中的UAE.S/GSO文件常要求特定路徑表述、型號分類和本地市場標籤格式。除非MoIAT/EQM確認可直接複用，否則應按新市場准入文件處理。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — energy-efficiency declaration is mandatory where the importer confirms the refrigerator model is in a labeled or regulated-energy scope under UAE product status route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for refrigerators subject to China's GB 12021.2 and CEL documentation; the scope is mandatory for China domestic sale before domestic market circulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 12021.2 / CEL data should be treated as baseline technical input only. UAE-target declarations for household refrigerators should follow UAE.S/GSO route wording and import-channel-specific label expectations before compliance closure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 12021.2和CEL数据应仅视为技术基础输入。面向阿联酋的冰箱声明应采用UAE.S/GSO路径表述及进出口渠道的标签要求后再完成合规闭环。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 12021.2和CEL數據應僅視為技術基礎輸入。面向阿聯酋的冰箱聲明應採用UAE.S/GSO路徑表述及進出口通道的標籤要求後再完成合規閉環。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Rating Parameters for Efficiency Reporting: 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: UAE low-voltage installations and labelling contexts are typically aligned to 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase with 50 Hz. Recycled Chinese domestic data that is explicitly built on 220/380 V baselines should be re-based before any UAE-facing energy declaration because rated energy, standby and thermal models in test sheets are sensitive to declared supply settings.
summary.zh: 阿联酋常用低压网络参数为230 V单相、400 V三相及50 Hz。若中国原始文件明确按220/380 V基准建立，需在阿联酋对外文件中完成重置后再作能效声明，因为额定能耗、待机和温度模型会受申报供电参数影响。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋常用低壓網絡參數為230 V單相、400 V三相及50 Hz。若中國原始文件明確按220/380 V基准建立，需在阿聯酋對外文件中完成重置後再作能效聲明，因為額定能耗、待機和溫度模型會受申報供電參數影響。

standards_or_laws: UAE power rating conventions for appliances and labels used in regulated or utility-facing documentation
IEC 60335-1 / IEC 60335-2-24 and related appliance-test annotations under UAE-referenced evidence pathways
IEC 62552 test reporting assumptions for refrigerating appliances when used as the reference method

summary.en: China domestic baseline engineering and labels in China are published using China’s 220/380 V framework under GB/T 156 assumptions for many domestic appliances. Those values are valid in China compliance context, but they are not automatically accepted as UAE-facing energy declaration input without parameter reconciliation.
summary.zh: 中国境内多数家电采用GB/T 156下的220/380 V框架建立工程与标签参数，在中国市场合规环境中有效，但在阿联酋对外声明中通常不能直接沿用，必须进行参数对齐。
summary.zht: 中國境內多數家電採用GB/T 156下的220/380 V框架建立工程與標籤參數，在中國市場合規環境中有效，但在阿聯酋對外聲明中通常不能直接沿用，必須進行參數對齊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 156 — Technical rules for low-voltage electrical equipment applications
GB 12021.2 and related Chinese energy labeling documents for household refrigerators
China domestic electrical rating conventions used in CCC dossiers

gap.en: Without explicit UAE-specific re-parameterisation, a direct transfer of China 220/380 V energy documentation can lead to mislabeling and misclassification in UAE procurement reviews. Confirm the declared supply range, nameplate settings, and verification mode for each model family before final label preparation.
gap.zh: 若未进行阿联酋专项重参数处理，直接转用中国220/380 V能源文件可能导致阿联酋采购审查中的标识错误和分类错误。应在生成最终标签前确认每个型号系列的供电范围、铭牌参数和验证模式。
gap.zht: 若未進行阿聯酋專項重參數處理，直接轉用中國220/380 V能源文件可能導致阿聯酋採購審查中的標識錯誤和分類錯誤。應在生成最終標籤前確認每個型號系列的供電範圍、銘牌參數和驗證模式。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory only where UAE-importer workflow requires model-level energy declarations in UAE-compatible voltage/frequency format
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China sale where GB/CEL documentation and domestic voltage/rating requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UAE-facing energy documentation should align declared supply voltage and frequency to UAE expectations before submission. The underlying Chinese energy test report is useful but not sufficient for UAE market-facing labels without parameter reconciliation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋面向市场的能效文件应在提交前对齐供电电压与频率设定。中国的能耗测试报告可作参考，但不足以直接用于阿联酋市场标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋面向市場的能效文件應在提交前對齊供電電壓與頻率設定。中國的能耗測試報告可作參考，但不足以直接用於阿聯酋市場標籤。
